patches.name: KH2FM Ultrawide Fix
patches.description: Two-site fix for KH2FM ultrawide black bars. Site 1 replaces the hardcoded 16:9 aspect ratio float with your screen ratio. Site 2 replaces the hardcoded '9' in the 16:9 FOV denominator table with the correct value for your screen. Apply before launching the game.

sites.notes: Aspect ratio float (1.7777) at 0x5FCE08. Replaced with screenWidth/screenHeight.
FOV denominator float (9.0) at 0x5A78BC. Replaced with 16*screenHeight/screenWidth.

patches.name: KH1FM Ultrawide Aspect Ratio
patches.description: Two-site fix for KH1FM ultrawide. Site 1 replaces the 16:9 aspect ratio float. Site 2 replaces the FOV denominator. Apply before launching the game.

sites.notes: Aspect ratio float (1.7777) at 0x3DFB20. Same resolution table structure as KH2FM.
FOV denominator float (9.0) at 0x3B1B14. Part of table [0.0625, 9.0].

patches.name: Re:CoM Ultrawide Fix
patches.description: Two-site fix for Re:CoM ultrawide. Site 1 replaces the 16:9 aspect ratio float. Site 2 replaces the FOV denominator. Apply before launching the game.

sites.notes: Aspect ratio float (1.7777) at 0x6532A0. Same resolution table structure as KH2FM.
FOV denominator float (9.0) at 0x507854. Part of table [7.0, 9.0, 14.0, 17.0].

patches.name: BBS Ultrawide Fix
patches.description: Seven-site fix for BBS ultrawide using the shadow-constant redirect technique. Site 1 writes the patched FOV denominator (16*H/W) to an unused slot (0x6337BC) adjacent to the original 9.0 constant (0x6337B4). Sites 2-7 redirect six of the nine callers of 0x6337B4 to read from 0x6337BC instead — specifically the three mulss projection multiplies, one stack store, one subss, and one minss. The remaining three callers (two comiss bounds-checks and one xorps/load) are left reading the original 9.0, which preserves UI layout. Apply before launching the game.
patches.filePath: KINGDOM HEARTS Birth by Sleep FINAL MIX.exe

sites.notes: Shadow FOV constant at 0x6337BC. Receives 16*H/W. Original 9.0 at 0x6337B4 is untouched.
Redirects movss xmm1,[rip] at 0x23ED2B → feeds mulss xmm0,xmm1 projection multiply.
Redirects movss xmm1,[rip] at 0x2541E9 → stores FOV value to stack.
Redirects movss xmm6,[rip] at 0x26F626 → subss xmm6,xmm0 (viewport calculation).
Redirects movss xmm4,[rip] at 0x4E4519 → minss clamp (viewport dimension clamp).
Redirects movss xmm4,[rip] at 0x4EC980 → mulss xmm2,xmm4 projection multiply.
Redirects movss xmm4,[rip] at 0x4ED471 → mulss xmm2,xmm4 projection multiply.
